export class NameIconShopParser{constructor(){this._items=[];this._equippedId=0;}flush(){this._items=[];this._equippedId=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();const items=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const key=wrapper.readString();const price=wrapper.readInt();const owned=wrapper.readBoolean();const equipped=wrapper.readBoolean();items.push({id,key,price,owned,equipped});}this._items=items;const eq=items.find(i=>i.equipped);this._equippedId=eq?eq.id:0;// Bridge → React (mirror bubbles)
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('name_icon_shop',{detail:{items:items.map(i=>({iconId:i.id,key:i.key,price:i.price,owned:i.owned,equipped:i.equipped})),equippedId:this._equippedId}}));return true;}get items(){return this._items;}get equippedId(){return this._equippedId;}}
